tagline: Now integrates OpenAI models for enhanced capabilities.
what_it_does: Genie Code now utilizes models served through OpenAI on Databricks, alongside Azure OpenAI and Anthropic models, when the partner-powered AI features setting is enabled. This integration allows users to access advanced AI capabilities, including Genie Code's agentic features, which are not available when the setting is disabled. The partner-powered AI features setting is enabled by default for most workspaces, providing broader access to AI functionalities.
why_it_matters: This update enhances Genie Code's functionality by leveraging powerful AI models, improving productivity and efficiency for data scientists and developers. By integrating OpenAI, users can access more sophisticated AI-driven features, which can lead to better insights and faster development cycles, ultimately driving innovation and competitive advantage.
plain_summary: Genie Code now utilizes models served through OpenAI on Databricks, alongside Azure OpenAI and Anthropic models, when the partner powered AI features setting is enabled. This integration allows users to access advanced AI capabilities, including Genie Code's…

capabilities.title: Enhanced AI Features
capabilities.desc: Access to advanced AI capabilities powered by OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Anthropic.

capabilities.title: Agentic Capabilities
capabilities.desc: Utilize Genie Code's agent mode for more interactive and intelligent code assistance.

capabilities.title: Compliance Flexibility
capabilities.desc: Partner-powered AI features are available in compliance with various security standards.

capabilities.title: Global Model Access
capabilities.desc: Databricks-hosted models are available for workspaces in the Americas and Europe.

prerequisites: Partner-powered AI features setting must be enabled for advanced features.
Compliance security profile (CSP) may restrict access to certain features.
use_cases: Developing AI-assisted code with enhanced suggestions.
Creating interactive dashboards with AI-generated visualizations.
Generating synthetic data for model training and evaluation.
limitations: Agent mode is not available when partner-powered AI features are disabled.
Certain features are not available in CSP workspaces unless specific compliance standards are met.

steps.title: Log into Account Console
steps.desc: As an account admin, access the account console.

steps.title: Navigate to Settings
steps.desc: Click on the Settings option in the account console.

steps.title: Enable Partner-Powered Features
steps.desc: Select the option to enable or disable partner-powered AI features.

steps.title: Adjust Workspace Settings
steps.desc: Workspace admins can toggle partner-powered AI features in workspace settings.

steps.title: Monitor Compliance
steps.desc: Ensure compliance standards are met for feature availability.

key_takeaway: Genie Code's integration with OpenAI models significantly enhances its AI capabilities, providing users with advanced tools for efficient code development.
